pi_items.source: task.json description (line 1-5) explicitly states: 'Create a scalar-valued function dbo.fn_CreateSlug'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
task.json description (line 1-5) explicitly states: 'Create a view Production.vw_ProductSEO'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
task.json description (line 1-5) explicitly states export path. Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 19) and export_result.sh (line 65).

task.json description (line 1-5) states: 'Query the view for ProductID 771'. Web search confirmed Product 771 ('Mountain-100 Silver, 38') exists in standard AdventureWorks2022 database. Verified in export_result.sh (lines 45-50).

task.json description (line 1-5) requires handling NULL categories/subcategories. Web search confirmed Product 1 ('Adjustable Race') has ProductSubcategoryID=NULL in AdventureWorks2022. Verified in export_result.sh (lines 52-58) as edge case.
setup_mssql.sh line 15 shows the official Microsoft SQL Server sample database download URL. This is the standard public AdventureWorks2022 database.
task.json description (line 1-5) example: 'Example Path: bikes/mountain-bikes/mountain-100-silver-38-771'. Web search confirmed Mountain-100 is in Bikes category.
task.json description (line 1-5) example: 'Example Path: bikes/mountain-bikes/mountain-100-silver-38-771'. Web search confirmed Mountain-100 is in Mountain Bikes subcategory.
Web search confirmed: 'Adjustable Race' (Product ID 1) has no product subcategory ID (NULL value). Task description requires handling NULL with 'uncategorized' and 'general'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Microsoft AdventureWorks2022 database (not synthetic data). Product 771 (Mountain-100 Silver, 38) is categorized under Bikes/Mountain Bikes. Product 1 (Adjustable Race) has a NULL subcategory and serves as the edge case. The task requires creating a scalar function dbo.fn_CreateSlug to sanitize product names into URL slugs, and a view Production.vw_ProductSEO that concatenates category/subcategory/product slugs with the pattern 'category-slug/subcategory-slug/product-slug-productid'. All metadata values (function name, view name, export path, and product IDs) are accurate and match the standard AdventureWorks2022 schema.
